connectionString.description: The connection string of the database.

serverFqdn.description: The server fully qualified domain name (FQDN).

earliestRestorePoint.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the earliest restore point of the database in UTC, using the YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format.

latestRestorePoint.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the latest restore point of the database in UTC, using the YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format.

backupRetentionDays.description: The backup retention period in days.

collation.description: The collation of the SQL database.

RestorableDeletedSQLDatabase.description: A restorable deleted SQL database object.

displayName.description: The Fabric display name of the restorable deleted SQL database.

properties.description: The restorable deleted SQL database properties.

RestorableDeletedSQLDatabases.description: A list of restorable deleted SQL databases.

value.description: Properties of a restorable deleted SQL database.

RestorableDeletedSQLDatabaseProperties.description: The restorable deleted SQL database properties.

restorableDeletedDatabaseName.description: The name of the restorable deleted SQL database. This is the name that will be used in the creation payload when restoring from this restorable deleted database.

earliestRestorePoint.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the earliest restore point of the database in UTC (e.g., '2024-12-01T00:00:00Z').

latestRestorePoint.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the latest restore point of the database in UTC (e.g., '2024-12-02T00:00:00Z').

deletionTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the deletion of the database in UTC (e.g., '2024-12-01T00:00:00Z').

displayName.description: The SQL database display name. The display name must follow naming rules according to item type.

description.description: The SQL database description. Maximum length is 256 characters.

folderId.description: The folder ID. If not specified or null, the SQL database is created with the workspace as its folder.

sensitivityLabelSettings.description: The sensitivity label settings for the SQL database.

description.description: The SQL database description. Maximum length is 256 characters.

UpdateSQLDatabaseDefinitionRequest.description: Update SQL database public definition request payload.

SQLDatabaseDefinitionResponse.description: The SQL database public definition response.

creationMode.description: The creation mode of the SQL database creation.

CreationMode.description: The creation mode of the creation payload. Additional CreationMode types may be added over time.

values.description: The default creation mode. The 'backupRetentionDays' and 'collation' properties are accepted in this mode.
The creation mode for restoring from a source database. The 'sourceDatabaseReference' and 'restorePointInTime' properties are required. No other properties are accepted.
The creation mode for restoring from a restorable deleted database. The 'restorableDeletedDatabaseName' and 'restorePointInTime' properties are required. No other properties are accepted.

NewSQLDatabaseCreationPayload.description: Create a SQL database item creation payload with supported settings

backupRetentionDays.description: Set the backup retention period in days. The minimum is 1 days. The maximum is 35 days.

collation.description: Set the collation of the SQL database.

RestoreSQLDatabaseCreationPayload.description: Create a SQL database item creation payload with restoring from a source database

restorePointInTime.description: Set the time to restore the source database in UTC, using the YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format.

sourceDatabaseReference.description: Set the reference for the source database to be restored from.

RestoreDeletedDatabaseCreationPayload.description:
> [!NOTE]
> PITR from deleted databases is currently in Preview ([learn more](/fabric/fundamentals/preview)). 

Creates a SQL database item by restoring from a restorable deleted database.

restorePointInTime.description: Set the time to restore the source database in UTC, using the YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format.

restorableDeletedDatabaseName.description: Set the name for the restorable deleted database to be restored.

SQLDatabaseDefinition.description: The SQL database public definition object. Refer to this [article](/rest/api/fabric/articles/item-management/definitions/sql-database-definition) for more details on the structure of the SQL database definition.

format.description: The format of the SQL database definition. Supported format: `dacpac` and `sqlproj`. If no format is provided, `dacpac` is used.

path.description: The SQL database public definition part path. Supported SQL database content extensions: `.dacpac` for `dacpac` format; `.sqlproj`, `.sql` for `sqlproj` format.

payload.description: The SQL database public definition part payload.

SqlDatabaseAuditSettings.description: The current state of audit settings for a database.

retentionDays.description: Retention days. 0 indicates indefinite retention period.

storageEndpoint.description: The storage endpoint where audit logs are stored.

predicateExpression.description: The predicate expression used to filter audit logs.

retentionDays.description: Retention days. For the first time, when state is set to Enabled and this property is not provided, retentionDays will be set to 0 (indefinite retention period) by default.

auditActionsAndGroups.description: Audit actions and groups. For the first time, when state is set to Enabled and this property is not provided, default audit actions and groups will be applied.

predicateExpression.description: The predicate expression used to filter audit logs. For the first time, when state is set to Enabled and this property is not provided, no predicate expression will be applied by default.

SqlAuditSettingsState.description: Sql Audit settings state. When enabling the audit policy for the first time after database creation (by setting state to 'Enabled' without other properties), default values are applied. For all subsequent enable/disable operations, the previous policy settings are preserved. Additional SqlAuditSettingsState may be added over time.
